name: Adam Smith
stanceSummary: Adam Smith has supported Israel's security response after October 7 while also calling for humanitarian aid expansion and a political path including ceasefire and long-term two-state diplomacy. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Smith stated Israel has a right to defend itself after Hamas attacks and emphasized long-term political solutions.
Smith called for immediate humanitarian aid scaling and ceasefire-linked strategy shifts in Gaza.
